event_world_42_20260423_085214_0000.name: Wine & Cheese Masterclass
event_world_42_20260423_085214_0000.description: A Michelin-starred sommelier guides guests through rare bottles paired with artisan cheeses, revealing the science and art behind perfect flavor harmony.

reviews.text: Perfectly sized event — big enough to have scale but small enough to feel personal and accessible.
Half the scheduled activities were moved indoors with no explanation; the outdoor programme was gutted.
Terrible organisation — queues stretched around the block and we missed the first act entirely.
Enjoyable event overall, though food stalls ran out of options by mid-afternoon.

event_world_42_20260423_085214_0001.name: K-pop Galaxy Tour
event_world_42_20260423_085214_0001.description: The world-sensation aespa is in town! Get ready for an unforgettable night of dynamic electronic dance music and stunning holographic visuals.

reviews.text: Average experience — neither the worst nor the best event I have attended this year.

event_world_42_20260423_085214_0002.name: Electronic Beats Festival
event_world_42_20260423_085214_0002.description: Three stages, twelve DJs, and a laser show that runs all night. Top acts from Berlin's underground scene headline this pulse-pounding electronic showcase.

reviews.text: Middle-of-the-road experience — worth attending once but not something to travel specifically for.
